conversation_transcript.opening: I want to build a B2B SaaS product for US enterprise customers to streamline procurement workflows.

push_twice_core_value.push_1_answer: Faster approvals, fewer manual touches, fewer lost purchase orders.

language_precision_audience.precision_question: Which slice of procurement teams specifically?
language_precision_audience.precision_answer: Mid-market procurement teams at Fortune 2000 companies, primarily on the East Coast of the US.

now.prose: Teams juggle spreadsheets, PDFs, and manual emails across procurement. Approvals get lost, vendors resend invoices, finance has no visibility.

three_month.prose: Procurement leads see a dashboard with approval backlog and bottlenecks. Email-to-PO conversion is automated for the top 20% of vendors.

twelve_month.prose: Entire procurement cycle runs in the tool; CFO trusts the numbers. Audit trail is single-source for year-end review.

expected_body_fragments.core_value: Streamline procurement workflows — faster approvals, fewer manual touches.
expected_body_fragments.problem_statement: Mid-market procurement teams juggle spreadsheets, PDFs, and manual emails with no single source of truth.
expected_body_fragments.target_audience: Mid-market procurement teams at Fortune 2000 companies, East Coast US.
expected_body_fragments.verification_metrics: 3-month: top-20 vendor email-to-PO automated. 12-month: full cycle in tool, CFO trust.
expected_body_fragments.competitors: SAP Ariba, Coupa, manual spreadsheet-plus-email workflows.

notes.fixture_owner: Plan 03-04 (this plan). Purpose: B-6 negative case — transcript contains zero regional signal keywords; asserts inferredCompliance resolves to empty list when the detector returns false.
